evidence.snippet: Ruffy Controls specializes in precision control solutions that enhance UAV performance, ensuring high reliability, responsiveness, and durability in mission-critical environments. Our advanced control components—joysticks, switches, and customized input devices—play a vital role in military UAV operations, optimizing remote piloting, navigation, and payload management.
**Discover how Ruffy Controls can optimize your UAV operations. Common Controllers for UAV Applications:**

items.notes: Joystick, switch, and controller components designed for UAV/UGV remote controllers and ground control operator interfaces. TSD and TS3 series explicitly marketed for uncrewed systems.

evidence.snippet:
3258 GREY HAWK CT.
CARLSBAD, CA 92010

Ruffy Controls specializes in precision control solutions that enhance UAV performance, ensuring high reliability, responsiveness, and durability in mission-critical environments. Our advanced control components—joysticks, switches, and customized input devices—play a vital role in military UAV operations, optimizing remote piloting, navigation, and payload management.
Ruffy Controls’ advanced input solutions are engineered to withstand the demanding conditions of military UAV operations.

Ruffy Controls develops and manufactures joystick and switch products for a large variety of industries including agricultural, defense, communications, industrial automation, transportation, and many more. Put the power and precision of Ruffy Controls at your fingertips.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Manufactures joystick and switch components that go into UAV remote controllers and GCS operator interfaces. Not a full GCS or platform OEM.

items.name: TSD Series
items.product_type: micro Hall effect joystick for uncrewed systems

evidence.snippet:
#### TSD Series
Micro Hall effect joystick with threaded shaft

The TSD Series is a micro, multi-axis Hall effect joystick purposely designed for uncrewed systems and robotics applications. Available with choice of M3 male or M2 or M3 female threading, the TSD Series allows users to easily adapt their own handle. The TSD Series is rated for over 2.5M actuations…

ndaa.notes: Site prominently displays 'Made In The USA' badge but makes no explicit NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claim.

evidence.snippet: ### SHORTEST LEAD TIMES IN THE INDUSTRY!
*   Built, and Stocked In-House!
From $65.00

readiness.notes: Catalog products with listed prices (TSD from $92.75, MSA from $65.00), online ordering, stocked in-house, shortest lead times claim.

unresolved_questions: NDAA Section 848/889 compliance status not explicitly stated despite Made in USA positioning
Blue UAS cleared list status unknown
tagline: Manufactures Hall effect and mechanical joysticks, switches, and desktop controllers for unmanned-systems ground control stations in production; specializes in miniaturized, sealed, and redundant-sensor designs for UAV/UGV remote controls. NDAA compliance status and any prime contracts are not publicly disclosed; public evidence limited to product datasheets and made-in-USA claims.
